title: Telegram Channel Capability Conformance
objective: Import the selected OpenClaw runtime's packaged Telegram message adapter, drive it through a deterministic platform shim, and prove Telegram's declared channel atoms plus shared workflow cases without live Telegram credentials.

phases.title: Provision Runtime Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment without starting the gateway so Kova can import the packaged Telegram adapter from the release-shaped artifact.

phases.title: Run Telegram Deterministic Shim Conformance
phases.intent: Import Telegram's real packaged message adapter, execute declared atom proofs and shared workflow cases through its adapter send methods, and record adapter/platform-mapping evidence without live Telegram credentials.
